title: THE SIX — ECHO DIRECTOR'S CUT V8
episodeObjective: Guide Maya from the damaged relay position to life support and EVA storage; prove the official six-person manifest is false; reveal seven biometric loads, an erased seventh suit slot, and a first voice before Hale.

e05_n01.speaker: MAYA
e05_n01.objective: Secure relay pack and move toward lower access.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: If I go quiet, both hands are busy. Or something is close. Terrible range.

events.notificationBody: Maya has the relay pack on.

e05_r01_relay_ready.speaker: MAYA
e05_r01_relay_ready.objective: Choose evidence-first or memory-first while Maya enters lower access.

events.text: Feels like carrying a second bad idea.
If the manifest lied, the air system might not.

e05_n02_memory_walk.speaker: MAYA
e05_n02_memory_walk.objective: Maya remembers crew as short human fragments while moving.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Cable. One second. Stepping over it.

events.text: Went somewhere else for a second.

e05_n02_manifest_moving.speaker: MAYA
e05_n02_manifest_moving.objective: Recover official manifest and choose Hale inquiry or movement.

events.title: CREW MANIFEST
events.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
events.caption: Official ECHO crew manifest. Six listed crew members.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Wall clicked behind me. I stopped. It stopped too.

events.text: Anything that could kill you with paperwork attached.
Useful people can hide inside useful work.

e05_n03_route_choice.speaker: MAYA
e05_n03_route_choice.objective: Choose fast exposed route or slow oxygen-cost route.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: A second set of footsteps started with me.

e05_n04_maintenance_crawl.speaker: MAYA
e05_n04_maintenance_crawl.objective: Maintenance route is claustrophobic and reveals Grant's tag.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Something touched the back of my neck. Cable. It was a cable.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Found a tag under the tray. Not touching it yet. Need both hands.

e05_r04_main_corridor.speaker: MAYA
e05_r04_main_corridor.objective: Main corridor consequence: faster arrival but pursuit mark.

e05_r04_maintenance.speaker: MAYA
e05_r04_maintenance.objective: Maintenance consequence: oxygen loss, Grant tag recovered.

events.title: GRANT'S SECURITY TAG
events.content:
DAMAGED ID TAG
NAME: GRANT WALKER
ACCESS: SECURITY / LOWER SPINE
STATUS: OFFLINE
NOTE: Impact scoring along edge.
events.caption: Maya recovered Grant Walker's damaged security tag from the maintenance crawl.
events.message: [GRANT'S SECURITY TAG ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Me finding him in a vent.
I'm angry so I don't get sad.

e05_n05_life_support_hatch.speaker: MAYA
e05_n05_life_support_hatch.objective: Open hatch; choose injury risk or pressure seam check.

events.text: Please choose the boring smart thing.
This is going to be loud.
I know why we did it.
Pressure was trapped behind the seam.

e05_n07_life_support_core.speaker: MAYA
e05_n07_life_support_core.objective: Reveal seven biometric loads; choose confrontation or movement.

events.title: LIFE SUPPORT ALLOCATION
events.content:
ECHO LIFE SUPPORT SNAPSHOT

Assigned crew capacity: 6
Active biometric loads before blackout: 7
Oxygen adjustment event: automatic
Unauthorized load marker: removed from index
events.caption: Life support record showing seven biometric loads against six assigned crew.
events.message: [LIFE SUPPORT ALLOCATION ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Be careful with the next question.

choices.text: ASK IF SHE KNEW ABOUT SEVEN.

e05_n08_maya_confronted.speaker: MAYA
e05_n08_maya_confronted.objective: Confrontation fractures trust and reveals memory damage.

events.text: And yes, I know how that sounds.
Only living person in the room.
But now that you made me look at the gap...
Like a door in my head got painted over.
I hate you a little for asking.

e05_n08_eva_route.speaker: MAYA
e05_n08_eva_route.objective: Choose direct traumatic route or slower oxygen-cost route to EVA registry.

events.text: I know what's probably still hanging there.

e05_n09_suit_prep.speaker: MAYA
e05_n09_suit_prep.objective: Suit prep route creates missing suit horror.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: I am not looking at the name tags.

e05_n09_decon.speaker: MAYA
e05_n09_decon.objective: Decon route costs oxygen but gives eerie room memory.

event.speaker: MAYA
event.text: Blue. White. Blue. White. Lights still cycling like cleaning matters.

e05_r09_suit_prep.speaker: MAYA
e05_r09_suit_prep.objective: Suit prep consequence: missing suit outline.

events.text: The missing suit had a shadow behind it.

e05_r09_decon.speaker: MAYA
e05_r09_decon.objective: Decon consequence: oxygen drop and steadier Maya.

events.text: Room smelled like metal and old antiseptic.
I used to hate that smell.
Now it means the room stayed a room.

e05_n10_eva_registry.speaker: MAYA
e05_n10_eva_registry.objective: Recover EVA registry and erased seventh manifest layer.

events.title: EVA SUIT REGISTRY
events.content:
EVA STORAGE REGISTRY

Slot 01 — ETHAN HALE
Slot 02 — MAYA CHEN
Slot 03 — GRANT WALKER
Slot 04 — RIVERA TORRES
Slot 05 — OWEN PARK
Slot 06 — SARAH OWENS
Slot 07 — [IDENTITY ERASED]

Slot 07 status: suit removed before blackout.
events.caption: Recovered EVA registry showing seven suit slots and one erased identity.
events.message: [EVA SUIT REGISTRY ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: I hate the math by itself.

events.title: MANIFEST_V2
events.content:
01 Ethan Hale
02 Maya Chen
03 Grant Walker
04 Rivera Torres
05 Owen Park
06 Sarah Owens
07 █████████

Layer status: identity erased, not redacted.
events.caption: Alternate manifest layer. Seventh entry erased rather than redacted.

events.text: Erased removes the place where it lived.

choices.text: ASK WHERE SHE SAW THE NAME.

e05_n11_removed.speaker: MAYA
e05_n11_removed.objective: UNKNOWN pushes story: removed, not missing.

events.text: I don't know that I don't know it.

e05_n12_ground_maya.speaker: MAYA
e05_n12_ground_maya.objective: Grounding earns trust before final intrusion.

events.text: Left hand hurts if I move it.

e05_n12_accuse_maya.speaker: MAYA
e05_n12_accuse_maya.objective: Pressing Maya creates trust wound and memory crack.

events.text: I saw the shape of a name.
But if I die while you decide whether I'm guilty, I am haunting your interface.

e05_n12_first_voice.speaker: UNKNOWN
e05_n12_first_voice.objective: Cliffhanger: first contact was not Hale and slot seven moved.

events.speaker: UNKNOWN
events.text: ETHAN HALE WAS NOT THE FIRST VOICE.
Something moved in the suit rack.
events.speaker: MAYA

choices.text: ASK MAYA ABOUT THE FIRST VOICE.

episode06UsageNotes.mayaHandInjured: Maya should complain about pain and type slower during Episode 06.
episode06UsageNotes.mayaConfrontedAboutSeven: Maya starts colder and more defensive if accused about the seventh person.
episode06UsageNotes.groundedMayaAfterErase: Maya trusts the operator more when panic spikes.
episode06UsageNotes.maintenance_crawl: Grant's tag can be referenced later.
episode06UsageNotes.suit_prep: Missing suit outline strengthens EVA horror later.
episode06UsageNotes.decon: Oxygen cost should be felt early in Episode 06.
episode06UsageNotes.episode06Focus: Opening investigation branch for first-contact records or Maya memory.

rebuildFocus: Reduced excess comedy and tightened Maya's voice around fear, pain, exhaustion, and trauma.
Increased horror: following footsteps, missing suit, erased identity, suit rack movement.
Improved tempo by shortening crew memory and removing long joke chains.
Made choice consequences visible in dialogue and stats.
Preserved core story spine: six names, seven biometric loads, erased seventh EVA slot, first voice before Hale.
Strengthened final cliffhanger with slot seven and suit rack movement.
rulesApplied: Each scene has a concrete operational goal.
Player directs routes, hatch handling, confrontation style, and final investigation focus.
Every visible choice has exactly two options.
Choices create visible consequences in dialogue and flags.
Lore is experienced through files, environment, and character reaction.
UNKNOWN pushes plot instead of generic glitching.
Episode ends with a strong next-question hook.
